provenance: deterministic seed-matrix composition (10 real systems x 15 real patterns); source_url = real canonical docs root per system

tools.name: Dialog / Modal — shadcn/ui
tools.tags: overlay focus-management dialog / modal shadcn/ui
tools.use_case: blocking decision or focused sub-task without losing page context
tools.pattern_snippet: focus-trap inside the panel, aria-modal=true + role=dialog, ESC to close, scroll-lock the body, restore focus to the trigger on unmount

tools.name: Toast / Snackbar — shadcn/ui
tools.tags: transient feedback toast / snackbar shadcn/ui
tools.use_case: non-blocking confirmation of a completed async action
tools.pattern_snippet: aria-live=polite region, auto-dismiss timer paused on hover/focus, stack with max-visible cap, swipe/closed-button to dismiss early

tools.name: Command Palette — shadcn/ui
tools.tags: keyboard navigation power-user command palette shadcn/ui
tools.use_case: fuzzy global navigation and action launching by keyboard
tools.pattern_snippet: Cmd/Ctrl-K to open, debounced fuzzy filter, roving-tabindex list, aria-activedescendant, recent + grouped sections, ESC to dismiss

tools.name: Data Table — shadcn/ui
tools.tags: dense data presentation data table shadcn/ui
tools.use_case: scannable, sortable, paginated tabular records
tools.pattern_snippet: sticky header, column sort with aria-sort, row virtualization for large sets, server-side pagination, zebra rows, keyboard cell nav

tools.name: Form Validation — shadcn/ui
tools.tags: input correctness form validation shadcn/ui
tools.use_case: real-time and submit-time field validation with clear recovery
tools.pattern_snippet: validate on blur + on submit, aria-invalid + aria-describedby to the error, focus the first invalid field, never block typing, inline hint

tools.name: Empty State — shadcn/ui
tools.tags: first-run / no-data empty state shadcn/ui
tools.use_case: guide the user when a collection has no items yet
tools.pattern_snippet: illustration + one-line value prop + single primary CTA, distinguish no-data from no-results-for-filter, never a blank panel

tools.name: Skeleton Loader — shadcn/ui
tools.tags: perceived performance skeleton loader shadcn/ui
tools.use_case: reduce perceived latency while content streams in
tools.pattern_snippet: shape-matched placeholders with subtle shimmer, show only after a ~150ms delay to avoid flash, swap to content without layout shift

tools.name: Hero CTA — shadcn/ui
tools.tags: conversion above-the-fold hero cta shadcn/ui
tools.use_case: communicate value and drive the primary action immediately
tools.pattern_snippet: one dominant headline, single high-contrast primary CTA, supporting subhead, visual hierarchy 60/30/10, no competing secondary actions

tools.name: Pricing Table — shadcn/ui
tools.tags: plan comparison conversion pricing table shadcn/ui
tools.use_case: let users compare tiers and pick a plan confidently
tools.pattern_snippet: highlight the recommended tier, anchor with annual savings, align feature rows, sticky CTA per column, parity in feature wording

tools.name: Navigation Drawer — shadcn/ui
tools.tags: primary navigation navigation drawer shadcn/ui
tools.use_case: house primary navigation on constrained or app-shell layouts
tools.pattern_snippet: focus-trap when modal on mobile, ESC + overlay-click to close, persistent on desktop, current-item aria-current=page, swipe-edge open

tools.name: Tabs — shadcn/ui
tools.tags: sectioned content tabs shadcn/ui
tools.use_case: switch between peer views without navigation
tools.pattern_snippet: role=tablist + roving tabindex, arrow-key move, aria-selected, lazy-mount panels, keep URL in sync for deep-link, no layout jump

tools.name: Accordion — shadcn/ui
tools.tags: progressive disclosure accordion shadcn/ui
tools.use_case: collapse secondary content to reduce cognitive load
tools.pattern_snippet: button header with aria-expanded + aria-controls, animate height via transform not layout, allow single or multi open, keyboard toggle

tools.name: Tooltip — shadcn/ui
tools.tags: contextual hint tooltip shadcn/ui
tools.use_case: surface a brief non-essential hint on hover/focus
tools.pattern_snippet: show on hover AND keyboard focus, ~500ms open delay / 0 close, role=tooltip + aria-describedby, never put interactive content inside

tools.name: Stepper / Wizard — shadcn/ui
tools.tags: multi-step flow stepper / wizard shadcn/ui
tools.use_case: break a long task into ordered, recoverable steps
tools.pattern_snippet: show progress + step labels, validate before advancing, allow back without data loss, persist draft, aria-current on the active step

tools.name: Infinite Scroll — shadcn/ui
tools.tags: continuous feed infinite scroll shadcn/ui
tools.use_case: load more content as the user reaches the end of a list
tools.pattern_snippet: IntersectionObserver sentinel, preserve scroll on prepend, provide a manual 'load more' fallback, announce new-items count to a live region

tools.name: Empty State — Chakra UI
tools.tags: first-run / no-data empty state chakra ui
tools.use_case: guide the user when a collection has no items yet
tools.pattern_snippet: illustration + one-line value prop + single primary CTA, distinguish no-data from no-results-for-filter, never a blank panel

tools.name: Skeleton Loader — Chakra UI
tools.tags: perceived performance skeleton loader chakra ui
tools.use_case: reduce perceived latency while content streams in
tools.pattern_snippet: shape-matched placeholders with subtle shimmer, show only after a ~150ms delay to avoid flash, swap to content without layout shift

tools.name: Hero CTA — Chakra UI
tools.tags: conversion above-the-fold hero cta chakra ui
tools.use_case: communicate value and drive the primary action immediately
tools.pattern_snippet: one dominant headline, single high-contrast primary CTA, supporting subhead, visual hierarchy 60/30/10, no competing secondary actions

tools.name: Pricing Table — Chakra UI
tools.tags: plan comparison conversion pricing table chakra ui
tools.use_case: let users compare tiers and pick a plan confidently
tools.pattern_snippet: highlight the recommended tier, anchor with annual savings, align feature rows, sticky CTA per column, parity in feature wording

tools.name: Navigation Drawer — Chakra UI
tools.tags: primary navigation navigation drawer chakra ui
tools.use_case: house primary navigation on constrained or app-shell layouts
tools.pattern_snippet: focus-trap when modal on mobile, ESC + overlay-click to close, persistent on desktop, current-item aria-current=page, swipe-edge open

tools.name: Tabs — Chakra UI
tools.tags: sectioned content tabs chakra ui
tools.use_case: switch between peer views without navigation
tools.pattern_snippet: role=tablist + roving tabindex, arrow-key move, aria-selected, lazy-mount panels, keep URL in sync for deep-link, no layout jump

tools.name: Accordion — Chakra UI
tools.tags: progressive disclosure accordion chakra ui
tools.use_case: collapse secondary content to reduce cognitive load
tools.pattern_snippet: button header with aria-expanded + aria-controls, animate height via transform not layout, allow single or multi open, keyboard toggle

tools.name: Tooltip — Chakra UI
tools.tags: contextual hint tooltip chakra ui
tools.use_case: surface a brief non-essential hint on hover/focus
tools.pattern_snippet: show on hover AND keyboard focus, ~500ms open delay / 0 close, role=tooltip + aria-describedby, never put interactive content inside

tools.name: Stepper / Wizard — Chakra UI
tools.tags: multi-step flow stepper / wizard chakra ui
tools.use_case: break a long task into ordered, recoverable steps
tools.pattern_snippet: show progress + step labels, validate before advancing, allow back without data loss, persist draft, aria-current on the active step

tools.name: Infinite Scroll — Chakra UI
tools.tags: continuous feed infinite scroll chakra ui
tools.use_case: load more content as the user reaches the end of a list
tools.pattern_snippet: IntersectionObserver sentinel, preserve scroll on prepend, provide a manual 'load more' fallback, announce new-items count to a live region

tools.name: Dialog / Modal — Headless UI
tools.tags: overlay focus-management dialog / modal headless ui
tools.use_case: blocking decision or focused sub-task without losing page context
tools.pattern_snippet: focus-trap inside the panel, aria-modal=true + role=dialog, ESC to close, scroll-lock the body, restore focus to the trigger on unmount

tools.name: Toast / Snackbar — Headless UI
tools.tags: transient feedback toast / snackbar headless ui
tools.use_case: non-blocking confirmation of a completed async action
tools.pattern_snippet: aria-live=polite region, auto-dismiss timer paused on hover/focus, stack with max-visible cap, swipe/closed-button to dismiss early

tools.name: Command Palette — Headless UI
tools.tags: keyboard navigation power-user command palette headless ui
tools.use_case: fuzzy global navigation and action launching by keyboard
tools.pattern_snippet: Cmd/Ctrl-K to open, debounced fuzzy filter, roving-tabindex list, aria-activedescendant, recent + grouped sections, ESC to dismiss

tools.name: Data Table — Headless UI
tools.tags: dense data presentation data table headless ui
tools.use_case: scannable, sortable, paginated tabular records
tools.pattern_snippet: sticky header, column sort with aria-sort, row virtualization for large sets, server-side pagination, zebra rows, keyboard cell nav
